texto: When a kid graduates from being the youngest in a family to being a big brother or sister, there's an amazing transformation. They have to make a big effort, and when they accept their new position in the family, everybody breathes a sigh of relief. All of a sudden they seem bigger, and they seem smarter, and they feel good about it, too.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Peggy Rathmann sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “When a kid graduates from being the youngest in a family to being a big brother or sister, there'…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, family, sister, útil em momentos de mudanca e sister.

texto: I had a cat I could not see,Because it stayed in back of me.It was a very loyal pet-It's sad we never really met.I had a nice petWho I never met,Remember it always stayed behind me. And I'm sure it was a cat, too.
